Could you send the price list, please?
Would you check the delivery date for me?
I can do it right away.
I really appreciate your help.
Can you help me, please?
Could you send the list, please?
Would you check the date for me?
Fernanda, can I ask you a small favor?
Of course. What do you need?
Could you send the price list to the supplier in Colombia?
Sure. I can send it right away.
And would you mind checking the delivery date too?
No problem. I prefer to call them, it is faster.
Perfect. I really appreciate it.
Happy to help. I will message you when it is done.

Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel from the trading team. I have a small favor to ask. Could you send the new price list to the supplier in Colombia today? They asked for it this morning. And one more thing: would you check the delivery date for me, please? I am in a meeting all afternoon, so just send me a short message when it is done. Thank you so much. I really appreciate your help.

Hi Daniel, this is Fernanda. No problem at all. I can send the price list to the supplier right away. I would be happy to check the delivery date too. I prefer to call them, because it is faster than email. If you need anything else, please let me know. I will send you a short message when everything is done. Have a good meeting.

First, open with a polite greeting like Hello Daniel. Then, make your request with could or would, like Could you send the list, please? Next, offer your help, like I can do it right away. Finally, close politely, like Thank you very much.
